---
title: "Water Temperature Report"
output: html_document
params:
      daily_mean_plot: NULL,
      daily_max_plot: NULL,
      seven_day_max_plot: NULL,
      all_ts: NULL,
      site_name: NULL
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}

all_ts <- params$all_ts
# Get single row which contains maximum recorded value
max_date <- all_ts |> 
  dplyr::filter(value_corrected == max(all_ts$value_corrected, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  dplyr::arrange(desc(datetime)) |> 
  dplyr::distinct(value_corrected, .keep_all = TRUE)

```



For site `r params$site_name`, the maximum temperature recording was `r max_date$value_corrected` and occurred on `r as.Date(max_date$datetime)` at `r format(max_date$datetime, "%H:%m")`.

## Daily Mean

```{r, echo=FALSE}
params$daily_mean_plot
```

## Daily Max 

```{r, echo=FALSE}
params$daily_max_plot
```

## Seven Day Rolling Average of Daily Max

```{r, echo=FALSE}
params$seven_day_max_plot
```
